THE_ARCHITECT.talk.STS2_MULUNDUS-HEARTWO: I am angry at the architect
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_RASPBERRY_KING.talk.AN: Did you know that sometimes trees dream of having teeth?
No! They just wish they could smile when the sun is out.
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_RASPBERRY_KING.talk.fi: Here, have a raspberry! They are sooo juicy and sweet.
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_RASPBERRY_KING.title: The Raspberry King
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_RAGING_MOUNTAIN.talk.A: Hmmm.. it has been some time since I last saw you. Perhaps something in my hoard can aid you in your quest.
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_RAGING_MOUNTAIN.talk.f: What brings YOU to MY mountain? I would not guess it be the balmy temperature.
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_RAGING_MOUNTAIN.title: The Raging Mountain
